articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: India Cricket Schedule 2026: Bangladesh Changes Game Times for Energy
articles.what_this_means: Bangladesh's cricket board is shifting match timings to save energy—a move that could influence how India cricket matches are scheduled globally. For NRI fans in the US, this means staying flexible with watch times for India vs Australia, IPL 2025, and bilateral series. Check Willow TV and streaming apps for updated schedules.

articles.title: Bangladesh Cricket Salary Hike 2026: What It Means for India Cricket
articles.what_this_means: Bangladesh's new BCB leadership under Tamim Iqbal has raised domestic cricket salaries for men and women—a first move signaling long-term investment in regional talent. For India cricket fans in the US, this means stronger opponents and more competitive South Asian cricket ahead. This shapes the broader cricket ecosystem beyond just IPL 2025 and India vs Australia Test series.

articles.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Moderate Forward Movement
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India will likely advance 10-26 days in May 2026 to approximately July 25 - August 10, 2014, continuing the stable monthly pattern of recent months. Retrogression risk remains low for now, but monitor July 2026 carefully as the fiscal year enters its final quarter.

articles.title: Salman Khan's Sanam Bewafa Re-releases April 10, 2026
articles.what_this_means: Salman Khan's 1991 cult classic Sanam Bewafa re-releases in US theaters April 10, 2026, riding the wave of nostalgia-driven theatrical returns. The film won't be on Netflix or Prime Video yet, but is worth a big-screen visit for Bollywood fans seeking authentic 90s cinema.

articles.title: Patlytics AI Patent Tool: $40M Funding & Impact on Indian Tech Lawyers
articles.what_this_means: Patlytics, a legal AI startup, just raised $40M and is reshaping how law firms work—creating high-paying career opportunities for Indian software engineers in legal tech. AI tools for developers are moving beyond chat into specialized domains where salaries start at $180K+. If you're an ML engineer or full-stack developer, this is your moment to pivot into legal AI before the talent pool catches up.
